title: stellaria sitchana
intro: Stellaria sitchana, also known as Pacific starwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stellaria sitchana include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in folk medicine to make salves, ointments, and poultices for topical applications.
